sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60805" key="kuna/gxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠν-άγχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n60805.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dog-throttler</tr_>, title of Hermes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
